tasks.title: Scope permissive CSP to /docs only in route factory
tasks.description: GAP-042-39: apps/api/src/utils/route-factory.ts hardcodes permissive CSP (unsafe-inline + CDN domains cdn.jsdelivr.net, unpkg.com) on ALL routes via applyRouteMiddlewares. Move the permissive secureHeaders() config to only apply for /docs/* routes. Non-docs routes should inherit the strict CSP from security.ts middleware (scriptSrc: ["'self'"]). Tests: verify non-docs routes do NOT have unsafe-inline in CSP header, verify docs routes still have permissive CSP for Swagger/Scalar UI.

subtasks.title: Read route-factory.ts and understand applyRouteMiddlewares flow
Conditionally apply permissive CSP only for docs routes
Verify non-docs routes use strict CSP from security.ts

tasks.title: Remove inline onclick from 500.astro
tasks.description: GAP-042-42: apps/web/src/pages/500.astro:141 has onclick="window.location.reload()" which violates CSP. Replace with addEventListener in a <script> tag. Add id="retry-btn" to button. Astro will auto-hash the script. Tests: verify no onclick= attributes exist in 500.astro.

subtasks.title: Remove onclick attribute from button
Add script tag with addEventListener for reload

tasks.title: Preserve non-CSP headers on /docs routes
tasks.description: GAP-042-30: apps/api/src/middlewares/security.ts:40 bypasses ALL security headers for /docs paths. Change to only skip CSP-related config, keeping HSTS, X-Frame-Options, X-Content-Type-Options, Referrer-Policy, Permissions-Policy. Tests: verify /docs routes have HSTS and X-Frame-Options headers.

subtasks.title: Read security.ts and understand docs bypass logic
Restructure to only skip CSP for docs, keep other headers
Verify existing tests still pass

tasks.title: Disable experimental.csp in Astro config
tasks.description: GAP-042-03: Remove experimental: { csp: { ... } } block from apps/web/astro.config.mjs (lines 137-160). CSP is handled 100% via HTTP header middleware. This eliminates the dual-policy conflict (enforcing meta tag vs report-only header). Add a comment explaining CSP is managed by middleware.ts.

subtasks.title: Remove experimental.csp block from astro.config.mjs
Add comment explaining CSP is in middleware.ts

tasks.title: Remove https: from web script-src
tasks.description: GAP-042-48: apps/web/src/middleware.ts line 111 has script-src with https: wildcard. Remove https: token. strict-dynamic ignores it in CSP3, and in CSP1 it allows scripts from any HTTPS domain. unsafe-inline already provides CSP1 fallback.

subtasks.title: Remove https: from script-src directive in middleware.ts

tasks.title: Fix xXssProtection to '0' in API
tasks.description: GAP-042-37: Change X-XSS-Protection from '1; mode=block' to '0' in apps/api/src/utils/env.ts (default value) and apps/api/src/utils/route-factory.ts (hardcoded value). The '1; mode=block' can introduce XSS in IE/old Edge. Modern recommendation is '0'. vercel.json already uses '0'.

subtasks.title: Change default in env.ts to '0'
Change hardcoded value in route-factory.ts to '0'

tasks.title: Restrict API fontSrc to self only
tasks.description: GAP-042-36: apps/api/src/middlewares/security.ts line 57 has fontSrc: ["'self'", 'https:', 'data:']. API serves JSON, not HTML with fonts. Change to fontSrc: ["'self'"] (keep self for docs routes that may render fonts).

subtasks.title: Change fontSrc to ["'self'"] in security.ts

tasks.title: Add upgrade-insecure-requests to all 3 apps
tasks.description: GAP-042-26: Add upgrade-insecure-requests directive to CSP in: (1) apps/web/src/middleware.ts directives array, (2) apps/admin/src/lib/csp-helpers.ts directives array, (3) apps/api/src/middlewares/security.ts as upgradeInsecureRequests: []. This instructs browsers to auto-upgrade HTTP to HTTPS for all resource requests.

subtasks.title: Add to web middleware.ts CSP directives
Add to admin csp-helpers.ts CSP directives
Add to API security.ts secureHeaders config

tasks.title: Add media-src 'self' to web and admin CSP
tasks.description: GAP-042-35: Add explicit media-src 'self' to: (1) apps/web/src/middleware.ts directives array, (2) apps/admin/src/lib/csp-helpers.ts directives array. API already has mediaSrc: ["'self'"].

subtasks.title: Add media-src 'self' to web middleware.ts
Add media-src 'self' to admin csp-helpers.ts

tasks.title: Change Sentry domain to *.sentry.io in CSP
tasks.description: GAP-042-29: Replace https://*.ingest.sentry.io with https://*.sentry.io in connect-src of: (1) apps/web/src/middleware.ts line 115, (2) apps/admin/src/lib/csp-helpers.ts line 67. Broader pattern per Sentry docs recommendation.

subtasks.title: Update web middleware.ts connect-src
Update admin csp-helpers.ts connect-src

tasks.title: Update default CSP env var in API env.ts
tasks.description: GAP-042-09: apps/api/src/utils/env.ts line 200 has API_SECURITY_CONTENT_SECURITY_POLICY default with unsafe-inline. The middleware ignores this env var. Either update default to match actual strict policy or remove the env var if unused. Verify if getSecurityConfig() in env-config-helpers.ts consumes it.

subtasks.title: Check if env var is consumed anywhere
Update default or remove unused env var

tasks.title: Replace inline style animation with CSS class in router.tsx
tasks.description: GAP-042-50: apps/admin/src/router.tsx:30 has style={{animation: 'router-pending-bar 1.5s ease-in-out infinite'}}. Create CSS class .animate-router-pending in apps/admin/src/styles.css and replace style={{}} with className.

subtasks.title: Add .animate-router-pending class to styles.css
Replace style={{}} with className in router.tsx

tasks.title: Simplify VITE_SENTRY_DSN env access in admin middleware
tasks.description: GAP-042-44: apps/admin/src/middleware.ts:41 has import.meta.env.VITE_SENTRY_DSN || process.env.VITE_SENTRY_DSN || ''. Middleware runs server-side only, so simplify to process.env.VITE_SENTRY_DSN || ''. Add comment explaining server-side context.

subtasks.title: Simplify to process.env.VITE_SENTRY_DSN || ''
Add comment about server-side context

tasks.title: Restrict MercadoPago wildcard to specific subdomains
tasks.description: GAP-042-40: apps/admin/src/lib/csp-helpers.ts:67-68 has https://*.mercadopago.com in connect-src and frame-src. Replace with specific subdomains: connect-src gets https://api.mercadopago.com https://sdk.mercadopago.com https://www.mercadopago.com, frame-src gets https://www.mercadopago.com. Tests: verify CSP contains specific subdomains not wildcard.

subtasks.title: Replace wildcard in connect-src with specific subdomains
Replace wildcard in frame-src with specific subdomain

tasks.title: Add static CSP-Report-Only header in admin vercel.json
tasks.description: GAP-042-51: Add Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only header in apps/admin/vercel.json as SSR fallback. Use baseline policy matching buildCspDirectives output but without nonce (static headers can't have dynamic nonces). This covers the SSR initial load that middleware doesn't reach.

subtasks.title: Compose static CSP-Report-Only header value
Add to admin vercel.json headers block

tasks.title: Add complete Permissions-Policy to web and admin vercel.json
tasks.description: GAP-042-32: Update Permissions-Policy in apps/web/vercel.json and apps/admin/vercel.json from 'camera=(), microphone=(), geolocation=()' to include: payment=(), usb=(), magnetometer=(), gyroscope=(), accelerometer=() matching the API's comprehensive list.

subtasks.title: Update web vercel.json Permissions-Policy
Update admin vercel.json Permissions-Policy

tasks.title: Remove duplicate security headers from vercel.json files
tasks.description: GAP-042-11: Remove headers from apps/web/vercel.json, apps/admin/vercel.json, apps/api/vercel.json that are already set by middleware (X-Content-Type-Options, X-Frame-Options, Referrer-Policy, HSTS, X-XSS-Protection). Keep vercel.json only for: Permissions-Policy, static CSP-Report-Only fallback (admin), cache headers, X-Robots-Tag. Add comment explaining middleware handles security headers.

subtasks.title: Clean web vercel.json duplicate headers
Clean admin vercel.json duplicate headers
Clean API vercel.json duplicate headers
Add comments explaining middleware handles these

tasks.title: Extract buildSentryReportUri to @repo/utils
tasks.description: GAP-042-08: Move buildSentryReportUri() from apps/web/src/lib/middleware-helpers.ts and apps/admin/src/lib/csp-helpers.ts to packages/utils/src/sentry.ts. Export from packages/utils/src/index.ts. Update imports in both apps. Remove local copies and 'intentionally duplicated' NOTE comments. Add tests in packages/utils/test/sentry.test.ts covering: valid DSN, invalid DSN, missing projectId, missing key.

subtasks.title: Create packages/utils/src/sentry.ts with the function
Export from packages/utils/src/index.ts
Update web middleware-helpers.ts import
Update admin csp-helpers.ts import
Add tests in packages/utils/test/sentry.test.ts

tasks.title: Add missing CSP helper tests for admin
tasks.description: GAP-042-23: Add 3-4 tests to apps/admin/test/lib/csp-helpers.test.ts: (1) buildSentryReportUri with DSN missing key, (2) buildCspDirectives includes upgrade-insecure-requests, (3) buildCspDirectives includes media-src, (4) buildCspDirectives has specific MercadoPago subdomains not wildcard. ~50 lines.

subtasks.title: Add test for DSN missing key
Add test for upgrade-insecure-requests presence
Add test for media-src presence
Add test for specific MercadoPago subdomains

tasks.title: Add nonce security tests
tasks.description: GAP-042-41: Create apps/admin/test/lib/csp-nonce.test.ts with tests: (1) nonce is 22 chars base64url (128 bits), (2) two sequential nonces are different (uniqueness), (3) nonce matches /^[A-Za-z0-9_-]+$/ (base64url format), (4) nonce is included in CSP header value from buildCspDirectives. ~30 lines.

subtasks.title: Create test file csp-nonce.test.ts
Add length/entropy test
Add uniqueness test
Add format validation test

tasks.title: Add CSP header integration tests
tasks.description: GAP-042-06: Create integration tests verifying CSP headers in responses. (1) apps/web/test/middleware/csp-headers.test.ts: test onRequest middleware sets Content-Security-Policy-Report-Only header with expected directives (script-src, style-src, connect-src, upgrade-insecure-requests). (2) apps/admin/test/middleware/csp-headers.test.ts: test buildCspDirectives output is valid CSP syntax. ~60 lines total.

subtasks.title: Create web CSP header integration test
Create admin CSP header integration test
Verify all expected directives are present

tasks.title: Add CI check for CSP-incompatible patterns
tasks.description: GAP-042-46: Add CI step or script that greps for CSP-incompatible patterns in .astro and .tsx source files: onclick=, onload=, onerror=, onsubmit=, eval(, new Function(, document.write(, javascript:. Exclude test files and node_modules. Exit 1 if matches found. Can be a shell script at scripts/check-csp-patterns.sh or inline CI step. ~15 lines.

Add CI step to .github/workflows/ci.yml
Verify it passes after onclick fix in T-002

Add as part of pnpm test run. ~40 lines.

tasks.title: Document setResponseHeader usage in admin middleware
tasks.description: GAP-042-20: Add JSDoc comment in apps/admin/src/middleware.ts above the setResponseHeader call (line 47) explaining: (1) why setResponseHeader() is used instead of spec's getResponseHeaders().set() pattern, (2) that it's an H3 API accessing event from async local storage, (3) that it only works in server function context, not initial SSR.

subtasks.title: Add JSDoc explaining pattern choice and limitations
